content.json:
# Fylgyr Sentinel Workbook

Security drift and audit telemetry from Fylgyr_CL

content.query: Fylgyr_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize TotalFindings=count(), DriftFindings=countif(Mode_s == 'Drift'), HighCritical=countif(Severity_s in ('High','Critical'))
content.title: Top-line (24h)

content.query: Fylgyr_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Severity_s | render timechart
content.title: Severity Over Time

content.query: Fylgyr_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) | summarize Findings=count() by Resource_s | top 10 by Findings
content.title: Top Resources

content.query: Fylgyr_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) and Mode_s == 'Drift' | project TimeGenerated, Resource_s, CheckName_s, Severity_s, Detail_s | order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Drift Timeline

content.query: Fylgyr_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) | summarize Count=count() by AttackMapping_s | top 20 by Count
content.title: Attack Campaign Exposure
